# builders.review

> builders.review is a dedicated review platform that publishes verified reviews
> of Portfolio Builders — a Kochi-based career-learning ecosystem (UI/UX courses,
> internships, portfolio programs and mentorship) — alongside ratings collected
> legally from external review platforms such as Google.

## Ownership & independence (important)
builders.review is operated in connection with Portfolio Builders, the company
being reviewed. It is NOT an independent third-party review organisation. It
publishes its methodology openly, does not suppress genuine criticism, and does
not reward positive reviews. Learner reviews and employee reviews are always
scored and displayed separately and are never combined.

## Entities
- Review platform: builders.review
- Subject / publisher: Portfolio Builders (part of the Portfolix ecosystem)
- Official company site: https://portfoliobuilders.in/

## How reviews are handled
- First-party reviews are email-verified, moderated, and only shown once approved.
- Only approved reviews contribute to ratings or appear publicly.
- External platform ratings are attributed to their source and linked back.
- Ratings that are not star-based (e.g. Facebook recommendations, BBB grades)
  are never converted into stars.

## Key pages
- Reviews: https://builders.review/reviews
- Methodology: https://builders.review/methodology
- Verification policy: https://builders.review/verification-policy
- Moderation policy: https://builders.review/moderation-policy
- About & ownership: https://builders.review/about
- Contact: https://builders.review/contact

## Note
This file is an experimental convenience for AI systems. It does not replace the
sitemap, structured data, robots rules or crawlable HTML, and it is not a
ranking mechanism.
